chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1973 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.18. 2. For hearing of CMA No.8421/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2025 Mr. Yousuf Khalid Anwer, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that petition is squarely covered by judgment of this court dated 06.01.2024 passed in CP D 132 of 2019 and connected matters, therefore, the present petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
